declared.title: Uganda: Freedom on the Net 2025 Country Report
declared.selection_rationale: Confirmed live via direct fetch, 2026-07-20 (real page title matched: "Uganda: Freedom on the Net 2025 Country Report", coverage period "June 1, 2024 - May 31, 2025"). Fourth Uganda data point. Coverage-contribution value: documents multiyear prison sentences for TikTok posts criticizing the president and continued anti- LGBT+ online entrapment (citing a May 2025 Access Now report by name) -- this coverage period ends just before the Jan 2026 election-period shutdown this corpus's OONI and CIPESA entries document, so read together the three give near-continuous Uganda coverage from mid-2024 through Jan 2026. Full content not yet read in detail; specific findings to be logged at semantic review.
